title: Heraldic Banner Patterns
description: Replaces vanilla banner patterns with custom medieval-style heraldic symbols
body:
![flags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb43c392dd248b06c029f295663a2ac7b961b482.png)

This resource pack replaces vanilla banner patterns with various heraldic figures (lion, eagle, griffin, etc.), allowing you to create more beautiful and realistic flags and give your buildings and decorations a more medieval look.

### Patterns preview

![Patterns preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b17c246f084ea1d22fa99bea5a9c6533a521af37.png)

**Features**
- Replaces vanilla banner patterns with medieval-style heraldic figures.
- 9 new patterns: Eagle, Double-headed Eagle, Lion, Griffin, Horse, Tower, Lily, Lozegne)
- Vanilla-friendly art style
- Maintains the quality of the banner when it is on the shield
- No OptiFine or mods required
- Compatible with most other resource packs (unless they also modify banners)
- Supported languages: English, German, Russian.

If you find any bugs, want to suggest any changes, or want to translate the resource pack into your language, you can contact me on my Discord
